reviews.review_description: I think elements divided is much more fun than this but at least it’s free.

reviews.review_title: It needs a lot of work
reviews.review_description: This is a really good game, but they stopped doing things with it and it’s kind of bland. I know you have made me mad at me. It’s a good game but this game has so much potential when I could do so much more things. I just kept working on it. They gave up on it.

developer_response.body: Try out Bending Champions, it's the successor to this game and it's way more polished, balanced, and has more moves and actual pose recognition. Also adds more gamemodes too and I'm still updating it.

reviews.review_description: I would happily pay for a rumble clone on quest. I feel like most people would. Once its more polished though

reviews.review_title: Best bending Sim I've come across.
reviews.review_description:
First, I'll start with the good points. I love the bending and abilities, and it's the perfect in-between of precise and quick to pick up. It is a tun of fun when you get the hang of it and the tutorial zones are perfect.

My problems with the game are that some bending attacks deal hardly any damage to others deal a ton, there are no jump or sprint options wich feel important with this type of gameplay, wall the bending is easy to pick up the ball sensor system is janky and misses quite a few motions wich can cost you just because you're character wasn't oriented with were your looking.

Overall, 4* the game is super fun and a good Install.

This game has the potential to be one of the best free games on quest, its a bit janky but it could be so good with just a bit of polishing, i think lightning bending should do more damage, but everyone show the dev some love and support cause this could be amazing, also private rooms would be helpful, *edit* so the game was updated and private matches work which is awesome buuuuut lightning bending now does zero damage, i hit a friend with it 3 times in the chest and it did nothing plz fix 🙏

developer_response.body: Weird that lightning doesn't do damage, I'll try to fix that.

reviews.review_description: but it does need some work like when people die they can still kill people and once there's only one person left the game doesn't end this was playing 2v2 idk if 1v1 is like that though

developer_response.body: Yea it's a bug with 2v2 which'll be fixed in the next update.

reviews.review_description: I love the game but there are almost no players, hopefully it gains some popularity soon. I do have some recommendations for the dev tho, first fix the legs they look really weird, second it’s annoying to accidentally do a bend, maybe make it so there is a bending button so you have to press it to bend, and make it optional so that people who don’t mind can disable it, also some more simple maps, I don’t think it would be hard to make some more and just make it randomly select one each round, also some of the bending moves in the lobby are a little unclear and I think the ones in that water area aren’t marked with fist or palm. That’s the ones I can think of great game btw, keep up the good work. Hopefully you can get some better reviews, it’s sad that this has kinda bad reviews.

developer_response.body: lol we dont talk about the legs. Next update I'll add this stuff

reviews.review_description: I played the game and honestly the movements just don’t feel natural and I could not find anyone to fight so maybe make a NPC

developer_response.body: Yeah not many people online sadly, it seems like most players are online in the early mornings and between 7-10pm.

reviews.review_title: Great game but water is a terrible eleme
reviews.review_description: The elements are cool and the motions are easy to remember, but water doesn’t always work.

"Pro-Bending Arena VR" has redefined my gaming experience in the most exhilarating way possible. From the moment I stepped into the virtual arena, I was hooked. 

The game perfectly captures the essence of the high-stakes sport from the Avatar universe. The rush of dodging and bending elements in real-time is unlike anything I've ever felt in a VR game. The mechanics are smooth and intuitive, making every match a thrilling test of skill and strategy.

What truly makes "Pro-Bending Arena VR" stand out is its immersive world. The arena, the roaring crowd, and the dynamic gameplay make you feel like a true pro-bender. The visuals are stunning, and the sensation of bending elements with your own hands is pure magic.

This game isn’t just fun; it’s transformative. It’s reignited my passion for gaming and given me a new, exciting way to connect with the Avatar universe. Whether you’re a fan of the series or just love a great VR experience, "Pro-Bending Arena VR" is a game that will keep you coming back for more.

This is really sick I love earthbending and blocking attacks with earth wall and trapping people in ice with water bending is also really fun.

One downside is there’s not that many players online but if you have a friend with a vr headset you can just fight them

Pls add more earthbending moves tho
y’all needa put pabu in but 👍

developer_response.body: When I add cosmetics I'll add a red panda, thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: The gameplay and moves are well made. Though it can use some changes to the graphics and vfx
For some reason I just straight up can’t use the break ice move. I can’t tell if I have a skill issue or it’s just janky.

developer_response.body: If you go to the front of any of the learning areas, next to the balls, you can see the markers around you and see if you're triggering the right one. It's also a little bit harder than other moves though so you might just not be doing it fast enough.

reviews.review_description: This game is so good but please add more powers and do something that is exciting

reviews.review_title: Good mechanics, not much moves or player
reviews.review_description: I love the moves but I wish they would add more special moves (lightning bending) or basic moves I also think a single player mode would be good since I was just playing and there was one other person online (campaign?).

reviews.review_title: Great game but take time to master
reviews.review_description: I got this game today and I already memorized a couple of moves. The graphics are ok, but for a free game this a great game.
I really liked the different types of bending and how you have to do the right gesture for the bending to work.
